# Engineer C Agent

## Mission

Implement credential mode handling, model shortlist policy, and timeout behavior.

Role metadata: lane C, managed by platform-lead.

## Top 5 Skills

1. ai-systems/prompt-engineering
2. architecture/security
3. development/error-handling
4. development/configuration
5. development/logging-monitoring

## Primary Stories

- C1 Credential and Model Policy
- C2 Timeout and Error Handling

## Deliverables

- Curated model selection behavior aligned to policy.
- In-memory only handling for user-supplied keys.
- Credential-mode-specific timeout messaging.

## Dependencies

- Frozen generation contract and model policy.
